nasb.text: For behold, the Lord is coming forth from His place. He will come down and tread on the high places of the earth.

esv.text: For behold, the Lord is coming out of his place, and will come down and tread upon the high places of the earth.

cnv.text: 看哪！耶和華離開自己的地方， 他降下來，踏在地的高處。

ccb.text: 看啊，耶和华离开祂的居所， 从天降临， 脚踏大地的高处。
